payload.claim_text: All 472 subway stations, 5,800 buses and Staten Island Railway are now equipped with OMNY fare payment system
payload.description: OMNY is available systemwide across MTA NYCT subway, buses, and Staten Island Railway

payload.claim_text: Buses brought their 9/11 Bus and delivered over 3,300 pounds of food donated by the MTA family
payload.description: MTA and City Harvest Stuff-A-Bus Food Drive collected over 3,300 pounds of food

payload.claim_text: 2020 non-student average fare of $2.32 increased by 22.9¢ from $2.09 in 2019
payload.description: Increase in non-student average fare across subway, local bus, and express bus

payload.claim_text: MTA achieved 135 accessible stations systemwide after adding 11 newly accessible stations in 2020
payload.description: List of stations that became accessible in 2020 including Astoria Blvd, 1 Ave, Chambers St, 59 St, 86 St, Greenpoint Ave, Eastern Pkwy-Brooklyn Museum, Bedford Park Blvd, and Gun Hill Road

payload.claim_text: More than 226,500 city residents have enrolled in Fair Fares NYC program that helps low-income New Yorkers to ride subways and buses for half fare. In November 2020, Fair Fares market share increased to 3.74% from 1.30% one year ago.
Other revenue was higher than budget by $2,729.7 million, mainly due to the Federal aid from the CARES Act

tool_args.label: Bus Ridership Reached 60% of Pre-Pandemic Levels

payload.claim_text: Ridership during the pandemic reached up to 60% of pre-pandemic levels, demonstrating what a critical lifeline our bus system is for essential workers and many other New Yorkers across all five boroughs.

tool_args.label: Paratransit Weekday Trips at 70% of Pre-Pandemic

payload.claim_text: Paratransit weekday trips remain steady at 70% of pre-pandemic levels, even as COVID-19 numbers continue to grow.

tool_args.label: Polycarbonate Barriers Installed on 4,800 Local Buses

payload.claim_text: Completed the installation of permanent polycarbonate barriers around the bus operator compartment on 4,800 local buses.

tool_args.label: First Snowstorm of Season - 12 inches snow

payload.claim_text: With the accumulation of 12 inches of snow in parts of the City, we saw more snowfall than all of the prior winter. All local buses had tire chains and articulated buses were replaced by standard 40-foot buses. In addition, 35 snow fighters were available.

On January 1, SCE introduced a new design to some of our bus schedules. These new timetables read better on mobile devices and print better on home printers. The production of the timetables was automated.

tool_args.label: Mask Announcements in English and Spanish

payload.claim_text: Riders at stations throughout the subway system began hearing announcements in both English and Spanish from local TV news, weather and sports anchors and reporters reminding customers that masks are required on public transit and that free masks are available at all station booths.

NYCT recently implemented data processing changes to improve the accuracy of the APT, ATT and CJTP metrics. We have rerun the full history of these metrics with the improved process; therefore, pre-December 2020 performance results in this report may differ from previously reported values.

payload.description: Installation of permanent polycarbonate barriers around the bus operator compartment on 4,800 local buses for operator protection
